# Emma's Sleep Advice
> Evidence-based baby sleep advice and honest product reviews for Australian parents. Written by Emma, an Australian mum — research-backed, no sponsored fluff.

## 🏆 Best Picks (Product Reviews)
- [6 Best Baby Monitors Australia 2026](https://emmassleepadvice.com/best-baby-monitor-australia/): Honest comparison of 6 top baby monitors for Australian families — Nooie, Cubo AI, Eufy, Lollipop, Uniden, and VTech. Includes comparison table, pros and cons, and final verdict.

## 📖 Sleep Guides
- [How to Choose a Baby Monitor in Australia](https://emmassleepadvice.com/guides/how-to-choose-baby-monitor/): Complete buying guide covering video vs audio, WiFi vs non-WiFi, essential features, budget breakdown, and buying checklist for Australian parents.
- [WiFi vs Non-WiFi Baby Monitor](https://emmassleepadvice.com/guides/wifi-vs-non-wifi-baby-monitor/): Honest comparison of WiFi and non-WiFi monitors — security risks, range, cost, hybrid options, and which type fits your family.
- [When to Stop Using a Baby Monitor](https://emmassleepadvice.com/guides/when-to-stop-using-baby-monitor/): Signs your child is ready to go monitor-free, Red Nose Australia safety guidelines, baby vs toddler monitoring needs, and practical alternatives.

## 👩‍👧 About
- [About Emma](https://emmassleepadvice.com/about/): The Australian mum behind Emma's Sleep Advice. No sponsors, no fake reviews — just honest advice from one tired mum to another.
